name: scaleRecipe
_note: cooking.scaleRecipe is a PURE-COMPUTE recipe scaler: scaleFactor = targetServings/baseServings, each ingredient quantity multiplied by the factor. Path-3 LENS_ACTIONS macro (registerLensAction) — NOT enumerable by the assassin's runMacro walk; the load-bearing proof is server/tests/cooking-lens-macros.test.js. It tolerates the CookingActionPanel double-wrapped { artifact: { data } } body (recipeData() unwraps one extra layer) — a regression that drops the unwrap returns an empty/default scale, which the behavioral test catches. baseServings defaults to 4, targetServings to 8 when absent. No DB, no network, never throws.
